articles.title: Best 150 Prime Day Deals Under $50
articles.description: Prime Day offers great deals under $50. Don't miss out on affordable finds from Ninja, Anker, and Samsung.
articles.impact: Grab these deals before they disappear!

articles.title: Nintendo Switch 2 Consoles for $399
articles.description: Amazon's Woot offers Nintendo Switch 2 for $399. This deal is available for a limited time during Prime Day.
articles.impact: Don't miss this exclusive Prime Day deal!

articles.title: Valve Removes 4K Gaming Claim from Steam Machine
articles.description: Valve has removed the '4K gaming at 60 FPS' claim from its Steam Machine page. This follows backlash from early reviews.
articles.impact: Valve responds to criticism by updating claims.

articles.title: Android 17 Introduces Foldable Gaming Mode
articles.description: Android 17's new foldable gaming mode features a virtual gamepad. This aims to enhance gaming on foldable devices.

articles.title: GTA VI Goes Digital-Only, Impacting Physical Media
articles.description: GTA VI will be released as a digital-only title. This decision raises concerns for the future of physical media.
articles.impact: This could signal the end of physical games.

articles.title: Google Launches Finance Android App
articles.description: Google finally releases a Finance app for Android. An iOS version is expected later this year.
articles.impact: Google enhances finance management with mobile app.

articles.title: Apple M6 Launch Expected Without Pro Versions
articles.description: Apple will launch the M6 chip without Pro and Max versions. This marks a departure from previous releases.
articles.impact: Apple shifts its M-series chip strategy.

articles.title: Over 100 New Tech Deals on Prime Day
articles.description: Prime Day continues with over 100 new tech deals. Discounts available on various electronics and gadgets.
articles.impact: Take advantage of these ongoing Prime Day deals!

articles.title: Microsoft Extends Windows 10 Security Updates
articles.description: Microsoft extends Windows 10's security updates until October 2027. This is a year longer than previously announced.
articles.impact: Users can stay secure on Windows 10 longer.

articles.title: Galaxy S23 Receives New Security Update
articles.description: Samsung rolls out a new security update for the Galaxy S23. This update enhances device security.
articles.impact: Galaxy S23 users benefit from improved security.

articles.title: iPhone Ultra 2 Development Approved
articles.description: Apple's second-generation foldable iPhone, the Ultra 2, is approved for development. This news comes from a reliable leaker.
articles.impact: Apple advances its foldable smartphone technology.
